metadata.design_philosophy: Optimize for LEARNING, not just engagement. Proxy metrics must align with genuine knowledge construction.

core_mechanics.name: Knowledge Streak
core_mechanics.description: Daily engagement streak for knowledge capture or reasoning exercises

mechanics.base_streak: Consecutive days of any knowledge activity
mechanics.domain_streaks: Per-domain streaks (CS streak, Music streak, etc.)
mechanics.streak_freeze: 1 freeze per week, 3 max stored - prevents catastrophic loss

milestone_rewards.365_days: Platinum Architect Badge + 10000 XP + exclusive theme

core_mechanics.anti_gaming: Must include substantive capture (AI verified, not just app open)

core_mechanics.name: Cross-Domain Connection XP
core_mechanics.description: Bonus XP for linking concepts across different knowledge domains

mechanics.novel_connection_bonus: 200 XP for first-time domain pair connection
mechanics.depth_bonus: Additional 100 XP for explaining the connection mechanism
mechanics.peer_validated: 300 XP if community validates connection as insightful

core_mechanics.visualization: Animated 'synapse flash' when connection is made between domain nodes

core_mechanics.name: Mental Model Mastery
core_mechanics.description: Level up by correctly applying mental models to real situations

mechanics.discovery: Unlock mental models as you encounter relevant situations
mechanics.application: Log real-world use of mental model for XP
mechanics.teaching: Explain model to peer for 3x XP (Feynman Technique)

core_mechanics.name: Reasoning Arena
core_mechanics.description: Daily reasoning challenges against AI agents or peers

mechanics.daily_puzzle: One reasoning challenge per day (inversion, pre-mortem, etc.)
mechanics.time_bonus: Faster completion = more XP (but accuracy > speed)
mechanics.peer_battles: Challenge friends to same reasoning problem
mechanics.leaderboard_segmentation: Compete within engagement tier, not globally

core_mechanics.name: Knowledge Compression
core_mechanics.description: Gamified spaced repetition for optimal retention

mechanics.recall_test: Active recall before revealing notes (2x XP for correct recall)
mechanics.compression_level: Synthesize multiple notes into one 'compressed insight'
mechanics.retention_score: Track what you actually remember over time

core_mechanics.name: Domain Conquest
core_mechanics.description: Visual map of knowledge domains with exploration progress

mechanics.knowledge_map: Visual galaxy of domains, each a constellation of concepts
mechanics.exploration: Capture concepts to 'light up' nodes on the map
mechanics.constellation_bonus: Light up all nodes in a domain for big reward
mechanics.bridge_building: Build bridges between domains for Polymath status
mechanics.territory_expansion: Weekly challenge to explore NEW domain

badges.name: Polymath
badges.condition: Active in 8+ domains with 50+ connections each

badges.name: Pre-Cog
badges.condition: Complete 10 pre-mortem analyses that prevented actual problems

badges.name: Steel Man
badges.condition: Successfully steelman 10 positions you disagree with

badges.name: Grandmaster
badges.condition: Reach Master level in 10 mental models

xp_system.level_thresholds: Exponential curve: Level N requires 1000 * 1.5^(N-1) XP
